hero.title: About Green Up

mission.title: Mission & Vision
mission.missionText: To offer our clients safe, quality and sustainable lifting solutions, combining the most modern technology with the most professional service.
mission.visionText: To be the most trusted and leading company in the elevator industry in Kosovo and the region, contributing to the construction of modern infrastructure.

coverage.title: Our Coverage
coverage.text: We serve throughout Kosovo and abroad
coverage.subtitle: From Prizren to Mitrovica, from Peja to Gjilan — our team is always close to you.

installation: Installation per EN 81-20/50 and CE standards

hero.title: Projects & Gallery
hero.subtitle: Quality work that speaks for itself

items.q: How long does elevator installation take?
items.a: Installation time depends on the type and complexity. Usually a standard elevator requires 3-7 working days. Home lift elevators can be installed in 1-2 days.
Yes, all our elevators come with a minimum 2-year warranty. Some models have up to 5 years warranty on mechanical parts.

items.q: What kind of maintenance is needed?
items.a: We recommend regular maintenance every 6 months. This includes checking safety systems, lubricating moving parts and testing functionality.
Yes, we have projects in Albania and North Macedonia. Contact us for international projects.

items.q: What elevator brands do you sell?
items.a: We work with the most renowned European brands such as Thyssenkrupp, KONE, Schindler and Otis, as well as quality brands from Italy and Germany.
Yes! Our 24/7 service is always active. You can contact us at any time of day or night for emergencies.

items.q: How much does home lift installation cost?
items.a: Prices vary depending on specifications and dimensions. We offer free consultation and no-obligation quote. Contact us for a personalized price.

items.q: Can an elevator be installed in existing buildings?
items.a: Yes, we have extensive experience installing elevators in existing buildings without prior planning, finding optimal technical solutions.
Absolutely. All our elevators are certified according to European standards EN 81-20/50, harmonized under Directive 2014/33/EU, and undergo regular inspection by competent bodies.

items.q: How can I request a quote?
items.a: You can contact us through the online form, phone, or visit our office in Prishtina. We offer free on-site consultation and assessment.
